sn37.3:1.1: "Bhikkhus, there are five kinds of suffering peculiar to women,[n.262] Mātugāmassa āveṇikāni dukkhāni. Spk: Particular (to women); not shared by men. which women experience but not men. What five?
sn37.3:1.2: "Here, bhikkhus, even when young, a woman goes to live with her husband's family and is separated from her relatives. This is the first kind of suffering peculiar to women … .
sn37.3:1.3: "Again, a woman is subject to menstruation. This is the second kind of suffering peculiar to women … .
sn37.3:1.4: "Again, a woman becomes pregnant. This is the third kind of suffering peculiar to women … .
sn37.3:1.5: "Again, a woman gives birth. This is the fourth kind of suffering peculiar to women … .
sn37.3:1.6: "Again, a woman is made to serve a man. This is the fifth kind of suffering peculiar to women … .
sn37.3:1.7: "These, bhikkhus, are the five kinds of suffering peculiar to women, which women experience but not men." sn.iv.240
